title: bidens subalternans
intro: Bidens subalternans, also known as the alternate beggar-ticks, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidens subalternans include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
